name: Hokkaido Kaiteki Koubo Hack Tick Stick Foundation
pros: All-in-one formula eliminates need for powder application
Affordable price point with included sponge applicator
Decent Rakuten rating (4.31★) from 1000+ verified buyers
cons: Limited to just 3 shades; may not suit deeper skin tones
Stick foundation formula can be tricky to blend evenly for beginners
shortDescription: All-in-one stick foundation with powder finish—affordable Japanese option.
review: This stick foundation promises to skip the powder step, which appeals to busy expats and travelers. At ¥4,980 with a sponge included, it's genuinely affordable. The 4.31★ rating is solid but not exceptional—some users report patchiness if you don't blend carefully. Best for those with normal-to-dry skin who want simplicity over perfection.
